description: Stunning modern craftsman home in the historic Riverside Terrace neighborhood. This beautifully renovated property features an open-concept living space with vaulted ceilings, a chef's kitchen with quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances, and a spacious master suite with a spa-like bathroom. The backyard oasis includes a covered patio, perfect for entertaining. Walking distance to Hermann Park and the Medical Center. Move-in ready with recent updates including new HVAC, roof, and energy-efficient windows.
